name: Forrest Griffin
winProfile: 1 Elite+ wins, 2 Top-5+ wins, 5 ranked quality wins.

primeWindowDetail.endReason: Canonical UFC-only prime endpoint for this fighter audit.

shortCase: A Rampage title win and defining Shogun upset with major UFC history, balanced by a short reign and damaging prime finishes.
bestArgument: Griffin beat Shogun and Rampage back-to-back, won the light heavyweight title, and added wins over Tito Ortiz and Rich Franklin.
counterArgument: He never defended the title, was stopped decisively by Rashad Evans and Anderson Silva during his prime, and historical importance does not create free points.
whyRankedHere: Griffin beat Shogun and Rampage back-to-back, won the light heavyweight title, and added wins over Tito Ortiz and Rich Franklin.
whyNotHigher: He never defended the title, was stopped decisively by Rashad Evans and Anderson Silva during his prime, and historical importance does not create free points.
finalTakeaway: A Rampage title win and defining Shogun upset with major UFC history, balanced by a short reign and damaging prime finishes.
